summary: Iteration 151: Charity Payouts V1 - All tests PASSED. Backend: 28/28 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows working correctly including payout creation, IBAN masking, form validation, and history display.

backend_api_tests.test_dashboard_returns_associations: PASS - Dashboard returns list of active associations with wallet info
backend_api_tests.test_dashboard_association_fields: PASS - Dashboard associations have all required fields
backend_api_tests.test_dashboard_croix_rouge_has_wallet: PASS - Croix-Rouge has wallet with balance and IBAN
backend_api_tests.test_list_payouts_returns_array: PASS - List payouts returns array with pagination info
backend_api_tests.test_list_payouts_with_limit: PASS - List payouts respects limit parameter
backend_api_tests.test_list_payouts_filter_by_association: PASS - List payouts can filter by association_id
backend_api_tests.test_payout_has_admin_name: PASS - Payouts are enriched with admin_name
backend_api_tests.test_create_payout_rejects_no_iban: PASS - POST /api/admin/payouts rejects if association has no IBAN
backend_api_tests.test_create_payout_rejects_exceeds_balan: PASS - POST /api/admin/payouts rejects if amount > available_balance
backend_api_tests.test_create_payout_rejects_invalid_date: PASS - POST /api/admin/payouts rejects invalid date format
backend_api_tests.test_create_payout_success_and_wallet_de: PASS - POST /api/admin/payouts creates payout and debits wallet atomically
backend_api_tests.test_payout_has_snapshots: PASS - Payouts have iban_snapshot, bic_snapshot, account_holder_snapshot
backend_api_tests.test_iban_validation_rejects_too_short: PASS - IBAN validation rejects IBAN < 15 characters
backend_api_tests.test_iban_validation_rejects_no_country_: PASS - IBAN validation rejects IBAN not starting with 2 letters
backend_api_tests.test_iban_validation_rejects_no_check_di: PASS - IBAN validation rejects IBAN without check digits
backend_api_tests.test_iban_validation_accepts_valid_iban: PASS - IBAN validation accepts valid IBAN format
backend_api_tests.test_iban_validation_normalizes_spaces: PASS - IBAN validation removes spaces and normalizes to uppercase
backend_api_tests.test_payout_creates_ledger_transaction: PASS - Creating a payout creates a debit_payout transaction
backend_api_tests.test_payout_rejects_inactive_association: PASS - POST /api/admin/payouts rejects if association is inactive

frontend_tests.admin_dashboard_4_cards: PASS - /admin page shows 4 cards including Reversements
frontend_tests.kpi_cards_visible: PASS - KPI cards (A reverser, En attente, Total reverse) visible
frontend_tests.associations_list_visible: PASS - Association cards displayed with name, balance, IBAN
frontend_tests.iban_masked_display: PASS - IBAN masked shows FR76 **** **** 0189 (first 4 + last 4)
frontend_tests.disabled_button_no_iban: PASS - 'Enregistrer un virement' button disabled when no IBAN
frontend_tests.disabled_button_no_balance: PASS - Button disabled when no balance
frontend_tests.payout_form_opens: PASS - Clicking 'Enregistrer un virement' opens payout form
frontend_tests.payout_form_fields: PASS - Form has amount, bank reference, date fields
frontend_tests.payout_form_submit: PASS - Payout created successfully via UI
frontend_tests.payout_history_expandable: PASS - Payout history expandable per association
frontend_tests.payout_history_shows_admin: PASS - History shows admin name for each payout
frontend_tests.associations_edit_form: PASS - Edit form has IBAN, BIC, account_holder fields
frontend_tests.associations_iban_prefilled: PASS - IBAN field shows current value in edit form

critical_code_review_comments: charity_payout_routes.py: Proper admin guard using require_admin() on all endpoints
charity_payout_routes.py: Atomic payout creation with rollback on wallet debit failure
charity_payout_routes.py: IBAN/BIC/account_holder snapshots saved with each payout for audit trail
charity_associations.py: IBAN validation (15-34 chars, starts with 2 letters + 2 digits)
wallet_service.py: debit_charity_payout bypasses 5EUR minimum for charity payouts
AdminPayouts.js: Proper IBAN masking (first 4 + last 4 chars)
AdminPayouts.js: Button disabled when no balance or no IBAN
AdminPayouts.js: Form validation prevents amount > available_balance
AdminAssociations.js: Bank fields (IBAN, BIC, account_holder) in edit form
seed_data_creation: Test payouts created during testing (TEST-UI-PAYOUT-001, LEDGER-TEST-*, TEST-*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Charity Payouts V1 complete. Endpoints: GET /api/admin/payouts/dashboard, GET /api/admin/payouts, POST /api/admin/payouts. Association assoc_croix_rouge has IBAN=FR7630006000011234567890189, BIC=BNPAFRPP, account_holder='Croix-Rouge Francaise' and charity wallet with balance (was ~30 EUR, may have been debited in tests). Other associations have no IBAN. Multiple test payouts exist in charity_payouts collection.

payouts_dashboard.returns: associations with wallet balances, IBAN, last payout

payouts_list.returns: payout history enriched with admin name

iban_validation.rules: min 15 chars, starts with 2 letters + 2 digits

frontend_features.payouts_page: WORKING - KPI cards, association cards, payout form
frontend_features.disabled_buttons: WORKING - Disabled when no balance or no IBAN
